title: phagnalon phagnaloides
intro: Phagnalon phagnaloides, also known as the Phagnalon or Rock Phagnalon, is a low-growing, woody plant native to the Mediterranean region. This shrub is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Phagnalon phagnaloides can be prepared for herbal use by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water to make a tea or by using it in ointments and salves to promote wound healing.
